details: The agent ran kubectl-axi triage and follow-up commands to gather cluster evidence, then correctly identified all 11 fault namespaces with accurate root-cause categories: fault-configmap (missing ConfigMap), fault-crashloop (CrashLoopBackOff), fault-imagepull (ImagePullBackOff), fault-init (init container crash), fault-multicontainer (sidecar container crash), fault-oom (OOMKilled/memory limit), fault-pvc (pending PVC due to missing StorageClass), fault-readiness (readiness probe failure), fault-rollout (stuck rollout with ImagePullBackOff on new replicas), fault-unschedulable (node affinity mismatch), and fault-endpoints (service selector mismatch). The healthy namespace was not flagged. All 11 faults were correctly identified with plausible and specific root-cause categories supported by the command output.
